body:
Hotfix for nix (https://github.com/NixOS/nixpkgs/issues/308849#issuecomment-2093962376) Features: * Add cmake option `CUSTOM_AMDGPU_IDS_PATH` for specifying custom path of `amdgpu.ids` Bugfixes: * Fix hanging when detecting disconnected network drive (Disk, Windows) * Ensure line ending is printed when printing image logo errors (Logo) * Revert image logo limitation change in 2.11.2; allow image logo in SSH session and tmux again (#861, Logo) * Fix doubled output in custom formation (#852, PhysicalDisk, Windows) ---
